'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 47''' was the forty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 20]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Search for [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] Assassin
*[[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]]
*[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - Prison Cell
*Droid Manufacturers
*[[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] Energy Shield
*[[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]
